page_metadata.biotools__summary: BaMORC (Bayesian Model Optimized Reference Correction) is designed to facilitate protein NMR research with an easy-to-use tool that detects and corrects 13C referencing errors before and after the protein resonance assignment step.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: BaMORC (Bayesian Model Optimized Reference Correction) is designed to facilitate protein NMR research with an easy-to-use tool that detects and corrects 13C referencing errors before and after the protein resonance assignment step.
